sourceRef: tip:When a benefit runs out mid-term

slides.headline: Avoid GIBill Surprises
slides.body: Stay ahead of VA benefit changes with VASCO Assistant Pro.

slides.headline: Stay Informed
slides.body: Stay up-to-date on VA benefit updates and changes.
bullets: Track GIBill and Yellow Ribbon changes

slides.headline: Ensure Compliance
slides.body: Comply with VA regulations and avoid certification issues.

slides.headline: Protect Certifications
slides.body: Protect student veterans' certifications from expiration.

slides.headline: Support Students
slides.body: Empower students with easy-to-use tools for GIBill management.

slides.headline: Save Time
slides.body: Free up time for important tasks with automated certification processes.
bullets: Focus on other student support initiatives

outline.caption: Avoid GIBill surprises with VASCO Assistant Pro. Stay informed, ensure compliance, protect certifications, support students, and save time.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Protect Certifications,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to draw attention.
